CurrentIssues.ID: ComplexCondition:FeedbackDocumentParser.kt:FeedbackDocumentParser$listOf(styleIndex, contributionIndex, problemsIndex, actionIndex, quoteIndex).any { it < 0 } || styleIndex > contributionIndex || contributionIndex > problemsIndex || problemsIndex > actionIndex || actionIndex > quoteIndex

ComplexCondition:PlatformAdminService.kt:PlatformAdminService$hostname.contains("://") || hostname.contains("/") || hostname.contains(":") || hostname.contains("*") || hostname.any(Char::isWhitespace) || hostname == "localhost" || hostname.length > 253 || IPV4_LITERAL.matches(hostname)
